'''Bola Yomm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Roon/Legends|Roon]] who was the wife of [[Nilz Yomm]]. Together they had one child, [[Auren Yomm Baobab|Auren Yomm]]. When Auren won the [[Roon Colonial Games]], [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Bisad Koong|Koong]], the Governor of the [[Tawntoom]] province and a losing competitor in the games, poisoned [[Umboo]], the province the [[Yomm family]] lived in, with a germ called [[Rooze Disease|rooze]]. Bola was infected but Nilz and Auren were spared. In addition, Koong accidentally [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] himself. Nilz was able to save his wife by making a cure, but Koong was not so lucky and [[Death/Legends|died]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Bola Yomm was voiced by [[Pam Hyatt]].
